<ModuleName>P_Uluchshenie_Scripts</ModuleName> <SourceCode>using System; using System.Collections.Generic; using System.Linq; using System.Text; using EleWise.ELMA.Extensions; using EleWise.ELMA.Model.Common; using EleWise.ELMA.Model.Entities; using EleWise.ELMA.Model.Entities.ProcessContext; using EleWise.ELMA.Model.Managers; using EleWise.ELMA.Model.Metadata; using EleWise.ELMA.Model.Services; using EleWise.ELMA.Model.Types.Settings; using EleWise.ELMA.Security.DTO.Models; using EleWise.ELMA.Security.Managers; using EleWise.ELMA.Security.Models; using EleWise.ELMA.Security.Types.Settings; using EleWise.ELMA.Workflow.BPMN.Diagrams.Elements.Swimlanes; using EleWise.ELMA.Workflow.BPMN.Models; using EleWise.ELMA.Workflow.Models; using Context = EleWise.ELMA.Model.Entities.ProcessContext.P_Uluchshenie;
namespace EleWise.ELMA.Model.Scripts { /// <summary> /// The script module of the "Business Process Improvement" process /// </summary> public class P_Uluchshenie_Scripts : EleWise.ELMA.Workflow.Scripts.ProcessScriptBase<Context> { public void GetProcessOwner (Context context) { var matrixItem = ((IBPMNProcess)context.ImprovedProcessHeader.Published.CastAsRealType ()).ResponsibilityMatrix.FirstOrDefault (x => x.ResponsibilityLevel == ResponsibilityLevel.Owner); if (matrixItem != null && matrixItem.WorkerId.HasValue) { var settings = (EntityUserSettings)context.GetSettingsFor (c => c.ProcessOwner); settings.Workers.Clear (); settings.Workers.Add (new Worker { WorkerId = matrixItem.WorkerId.Value, WorkerType = matrixItem.WorkerType }); settings.Save (); } else { var admin = (User)UserManager.Instance.Load (Security.SecurityConstants.AdminUserUid); var propMetadata = ((ClassMetadata)MetadataLoader.LoadMetadata (context.GetType ())).Properties.First (p => p.Name == "ProcessOwner"); var swimlane = context.WorkflowInstance.Process.Diagram.Elements.OfType<SwimlaneElement> ().First (s => s.ExecuterProperty == propMetadata.Uid); var swimlaneExecutor = context.WorkflowInstance.SwimlaneExecutors.FirstOrDefault (se => se.SwimlaneUid == swimlane.Uid); if (swimlaneExecutor == null) { swimlaneExecutor = new WorkflowSwimlaneExecutor { SwimlaneUid = swimlane.Uid, WorkflowInstance = context.WorkflowInstance }; context.WorkflowInstance.SwimlaneExecutors.Add (swimlaneExecutor); } swimlaneExecutor.User = admin; // Default executor context.Worker = admin; } } } } </SourceCode> <CodeItems></CodeItems> <ScriptMetodsList>GetProcessOwner</ScriptMetodsList> <CompiledFileName>C:\Users\belousov\AppData\Local\Temp\ProcessScripts_387ee6ea6ed34b94a5e4e01c7a9cd3ae.cs</CompiledFileName> <References>System;System.Core;System.ComponentModel.DataAnnotations;System.Configuration</References> <WebReferences></WebReferences> <AssemblyName>ProcessScripts_387ee6ea6ed34b94a5e4e01c7a9cd3ae</AssemblyName> <Namespace>EleWise.ELMA.Model.Scripts</Namespace> <ClassName>P_Uluchshenie_Scripts</ClassName> </Entity> </Packet> </Data> </ConfigurationData> </ConfigExport320>

<ModuleName>P_Uluchshenie_Scripts</ModuleName> <SourceCode>using System; using System.Collections.Generic; using System.Linq; using System.Text;
using EleWise.ELMA.Extensions; using EleWise.ELMA.Model.Common; using EleWise.ELMA.Model.Entities; using EleWise.ELMA.Model.Entities.ProcessContext; using EleWise.ELMA.Model.Managers; using EleWise.ELMA.Model.Metadata; using EleWise.ELMA.Model.Services; using EleWise.ELMA.Model.Types.Settings; using EleWise.ELMA.Security.DTO.Models; using EleWise.ELMA.Security.Managers; using EleWise.ELMA.Security.Models; using EleWise.ELMA.Security.Types.Settings; using EleWise.ELMA.Workflow.BPMN.Diagrams.Elements.Swimlanes; using EleWise.ELMA.Workflow.BPMN.Models; using EleWise.ELMA.Workflow.Models; using Context = EleWise.ELMA.Model.Entities.ProcessContext.P_Uluchshenie;
namespace EleWise.ELMA.Model.Scripts {
/// <summary> /// Модуль сценариев процесса "Улучшение" /// </summary> public class P_Uluchshenie_Scripts : EleWise.ELMA.Workflow.Scripts.ProcessScriptBase<Context> {
public void ProcessOwnerResolver(Context context) { var matrixItem = ((IBPMNProcess) context.ImprovedProcessHeader.Published.CastAsRealType()).ResponsibilityMatrix.FirstOrDefault(x => x.ResponsibilityLevel == ResponsibilityLevel.Owner); if (matrixItem != null && matrixItem.WorkerId.HasValue) { var settings = (EntityUserSettings)context.GetSettingsFor(c => c.ProcessOwner); settings.Workers.Clear(); settings.Workers.Add(new Worker { WorkerId = matrixItem.WorkerId.Value, WorkerType = matrixItem.WorkerType }); settings.Save(); } else { var admin = (User) UserManager.Instance.Load(Security.SecurityConstants.AdminUserUid);
var propMetadata = ((ClassMetadata)MetadataLoader.LoadMetadata(context.GetType())).Properties.First(p => p.Name == "ProcessOwner"); var swimlane = context.WorkflowInstance.Process.Diagram.Elements.OfType<SwimlaneElement>().First(s => s.ExecuterProperty == propMetadata.Uid); var swimlaneExecutor = context.WorkflowInstance.SwimlaneExecutors.FirstOrDefault(se => se.SwimlaneUid == swimlane.Uid); if (swimlaneExecutor == null) { swimlaneExecutor = new WorkflowSwimlaneExecutor { SwimlaneUid = swimlane.Uid, WorkflowInstance = context.WorkflowInstance }; context.WorkflowInstance.SwimlaneExecutors.Add(swimlaneExecutor); } swimlaneExecutor.User = admin;
// исполнитель по умолчанию context.Worker = admin; }
}
}
} </SourceCode> <CompiledFileName /> <References>System;System.Core;System.ComponentModel.DataAnnotations;System.Configuration</References> <AssemblyName /> <Namespace>EleWise.ELMA.Model.Scripts</Namespace> <ClassName>P_Uluchshenie_Scripts</ClassName> </Entity> </Packet> </Data> </ConfigurationData> </ConfigExport320>

<SourceCode>using System; using EleWise.ELMA.BPM.Web.Security.ExtensionPoints; using EleWise.ELMA.ComponentModel; using EleWise.ELMA.Extensions; using EleWise.ELMA.Security.Managers; using EleWise.ELMA.Security.Models; using EleWise.ELMA.Services; using EleWise.ELMA.Tasks.Models; using EleWise.ELMA.Workflow.Models; using Parameters = EleWise.ELMA.Workflow.Models.Parameters.CA_UserBloсk;
namespace EleWise.ELMA.Model.Scripts {
/// <summary> /// The script module of the "Block User" custom activity /// </summary> //Warning! Do not change the class name public class CA_UserBloсk_Scripts {
//Warning! The class must have Execute method with this signature public void Execute(Parameters parameters) { var user = parameters.BlockUser;
var blockUserModel = new InstanceOf<IBlockUserModel> { New = { BlockUser = user } }.New;
var blockUserReplacementWorkflowResponsibleModel = blockUserModel as IBlockUserReplacementWorkflowResponsibleModel; blockUserReplacementWorkflowResponsibleModel.ChangeResponsible = parameters.ResponsibleUser != null; if (blockUserReplacementWorkflowResponsibleModel.ChangeResponsible) { blockUserReplacementWorkflowResponsibleModel.ResponsibleUser = parameters.ResponsibleUser; }
var blockUserReplacementTaskModel = blockUserModel as IBlockUserReplacementTaskModel; blockUserReplacementTaskModel.CreateBlockUserTask = parameters.ReplacementTaskExecutor != null; if (blockUserReplacementTaskModel.CreateBlockUserTask) { blockUserReplacementTaskModel.ReplacementTask = new InstanceOf<IReplacementTask> { New = { Executor = parameters.ReplacementTaskExecutor, StartDate = parameters.ReplacementTaskStartDate ?? DateTime.Now, EndDate = parameters.ReplacementTaskEndDate ?? DateTime.Now.AddMinutes(15) } }.New; }
var extensions = ComponentManager.Current.GetExtensionPoints<IBlockUserActionExtension>(); extensions.ForEach(e => e.HandleModel(blockUserModel));
UserManager.Instance.Block(user); }
}
}</SourceCode> <CodeItems></CodeItems> <ScriptMetodsList>Execute</ScriptMetodsList> <CompiledFileName /> <References>System;System.Core;System.ComponentModel.DataAnnotations;System.Configuration;Microsoft.CSharp;System.Web;System.Web.Services;System.Xml;System.ServiceModel;System.Runtime.Serialization;System.Drawing;</References> <ElmaReferences /> <WebReferences></WebReferences> <LocalReferences></LocalReferences> <GlobalScriptModules></GlobalScriptModules> <AssemblyName>ProcessScripts_8cf84636323546098c4b6d3b012e414d</AssemblyName> <Namespace>EleWise.ELMA.Model.Scripts</Namespace> <ClassName>CA_UserBloсk_Scripts</ClassName> <ScriptMethods></ScriptMethods> </Entity> </Packet> </Data> </ConfigurationData> </ConfigExport320>
